The '''New Republic Presidential election of [[11 ABY/Legends|11 ABY]]''' saw the resignation of [[Mon Mothma/Legends|Mon Mothma]], [[Chief of State (New Republic)/Legends|Chief of State]] of the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] for seven [[Standard year/Legends|years]]. She named as her successor [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa Solo]], her right hand for eleven of those years, which led to her election by the [[New Republic Senate/Legends|New Republic Senate]].

It was the first change of leadership in the New Republic, although due to the nature of both the incumbent and the Chief-elect, executive policies remained essentially the same. However, it did see the dissolution of the [[Inner Council (New Republic)|New Republic Inner Council]] and its replacement by the [[New Republic Ruling Council]].

Occasional absences from office by Organa Solo would result in brief 'caretaker' terms by Mothma and [[Ponc Gavrisom]], and she was nearly toppled from power by the Senate during the [[Black Fleet Crisis]], but she weathered all storms, not resigning from office until [[23 ABY/Legends|23 ABY]].
